nasb.text: Jesus gave them permission. And coming out, the unclean spirits entered the swine; and the herd rushed down the steep bank into the sea, about two thousand of them; and they were drowned in the sea.

esv.text: So he gave them permission. And the unclean spirits came out and entered the pigs; and the herd, numbering about two thousand, rushed down the steep bank into the sea and drowned in the sea.

cnv.text: 耶穌准了他們。污靈就出來，進到豬群裡去，於是那群豬闖下山崖，掉在海裡淹死了，豬的數目約有兩千。

ccb.text: 耶稣允许了，污鬼就离开那人，进入猪群。那群猪就一路奔下陡坡，冲进湖里淹死了，约有两千头。

csbs.text: 耶稣准许了它们，污灵就出来，进入猪里面。那群猪约有两千头，它们从山崖冲到湖里，在湖里淹死了。
